_readme: 25 drug-herb case studies spanning the risk spectrum (RED/YELLOW/GREEN). 'sample_message' is the literal text to post in the Sangam Case Room. 'pk_params' are simplified one-compartment oral PK parameters (illustrative only, not clinically validated). Cases 1-5 are original demo cases; cases 6-25 expand to production coverage of Indian polypharmacy patterns.

cases.title: Warfarin + Guggulu
cases.mechanism: Guggulsterones inhibit CYP2C9 (and to a lesser extent CYP3A4), reducing warfarin clearance and increasing anticoagulant exposure -> elevated bleeding risk.
cases.sample_message: @Intake @PatientProfile New case: 68F on Warfarin 5mg once daily (CYP2C9 *1/*3, CYP3A4 normal, eGFR 55) has started taking Guggulu 500mg twice daily for cholesterol. Please assess for interactions.

cases.title: Digoxin + Yashtimadhu (Licorice)
cases.mechanism: Glycyrrhizin/glycyrrhetinic acid from licorice causes hypokalemia (pseudoaldosteronism), which potentiates digoxin's effect on cardiac Na+/K+-ATPase; glycyrrhetinic acid also inhibits P-gp, the main digoxin transporter -> digoxin toxicity risk.
cases.sample_message: @Intake @PatientProfile New case: 72M on Digoxin 0.25mg once daily (CYP2C9 *1/*1, CYP3A4 normal, eGFR 48) has started taking Yashtimadhu (licorice root) 1g twice daily for acidity. Please assess for interactions.

cases.title: Metformin + Karela (Bitter Gourd)
cases.mechanism: Bitter gourd constituents (charantin, polypeptide-p) lower blood glucose via mechanisms independent of metformin, producing an additive pharmacodynamic glucose-lowering effect rather than a pharmacokinetic interaction.
cases.sample_message: @Intake @PatientProfile New case: 55F on Metformin 500mg twice daily (CYP2C9 *1/*1, CYP3A4 normal, eGFR 75) has started drinking 100mL fresh karela (bitter gourd) juice once daily. Please assess for interactions.

cases.title: Tacrolimus + St. John's Wort

herbs.name: St. John's Wort
herbs.dose: 300 mg standardized extract, three times daily

cases.mechanism: Hyperforin in St. John's Wort is a potent PXR agonist that induces CYP3A4 (and P-gp), substantially lowering tacrolimus blood levels in a transplant patient who is already a reduced CYP3A4 metabolizer -> risk of subtherapeutic levels and organ rejection.
cases.sample_message: @Intake @PatientProfile New case: 45M post-kidney-transplant on Tacrolimus 2mg twice daily (CYP2C9 *1/*1, CYP3A4 reduced, eGFR 85) has started self-medicating with St. John's Wort 300mg three times daily for low mood. Please assess for interactions.

cases.title: Paracetamol + Tulsi

drugs.name: Paracetamol
drugs.frequency: as needed, up to three times daily

cases.mechanism: Tulsi constituents (eugenol, ursolic acid, rosmarinic acid) show no clinically meaningful modulation of acetaminophen's metabolism at typical dietary/supplemental exposure.
cases.sample_message: @Intake @PatientProfile New case: 30F (CYP2C9 *1/*1, CYP3A4 normal, eGFR 100) occasionally takes Paracetamol 500mg for headaches and drinks 2 cups of tulsi tea daily. Please assess for interactions.

cases.title: Aspirin + Ashwagandha
cases.mechanism: Withaferin A from Ashwagandha inhibits COX-1 and platelet thromboxane synthesis, additive with aspirin's antiplatelet mechanism; mild analogy-based CYP2C9 inhibition (salicylate minor clearance pathway) may modestly increase aspirin exposure, elevating bleeding risk. (Tier calc: delta_g=-6.8 CYP2C9 inhibition -> ccf=-0.20 -> AUC +25%; 2x moderate evidence -> YELLOW)
cases.sample_message: @Intake @PatientProfile New case: 62M on Aspirin 75mg once daily for coronary artery disease (CYP2C9 *1/*2, CYP3A4 normal, eGFR 72) has been taking Ashwagandha 300mg twice daily for stress and fatigue. Please assess for interactions.

cases.title: Atorvastatin + Brahmi

herbs.name: Brahmi
herbs.dose: 300 mg standardized extract (45% bacosides), twice daily

cases.mechanism: Bacoside A in Brahmi inhibits CYP3A4 in hepatic microsomes; atorvastatin is primarily metabolised by CYP3A4. Elevated statin AUC substantially increases risk of myopathy and rhabdomyolysis. (Tier calc: delta_g=-7.8 CYP3A4 inhibition -> ccf=-0.45 -> |ccf|=0.45>=0.4 + high confidence -> RED; 1x high evidence confirms)
cases.sample_message: @Intake @PatientProfile New case: 55M on Atorvastatin 40mg once daily for hypercholesterolemia (CYP2C9 *1/*1, CYP3A4 normal, eGFR 82) has started taking Brahmi (Bacopa monnieri) 300mg twice daily for memory enhancement. Please assess for interactions.

cases.title: Amlodipine + Arjuna
cases.mechanism: Terminalia arjuna bark exerts calcium-channel antagonism in myocardium and vasculature, additive with amlodipine's antihypertensive mechanism. Arjunolic acid has analogy-based CYP3A4 inhibition that may modestly increase amlodipine exposure. (Tier calc: delta_g=-6.7 CYP3A4 inhibition -> ccf=-0.175 -> AUC +21%; 2x moderate evidence -> YELLOW)
cases.sample_message: @Intake @PatientProfile New case: 58F on Amlodipine 5mg once daily for hypertension (CYP2C9 *1/*1, CYP3A4 normal, eGFR 78) has added Arjuna (Terminalia arjuna) 500mg bark powder twice daily on Ayurvedic recommendation for heart health. Please assess for interactions.

cases.title: Methotrexate + Neem
cases.mechanism: Nimbolide inhibits P-glycoprotein, reducing methotrexate renal tubular secretion and increasing intracellular accumulation. Both methotrexate and neem compounds are independently hepatotoxic; co-administration elevates hepatotoxicity risk substantially. (Tier calc: delta_g=-7.6 P-gp inhibition -> ccf=-0.40 -> |ccf|=0.40>=0.4 + high confidence -> RED; 1x high evidence confirms)
cases.sample_message: @Intake @PatientProfile New case: 45F on Methotrexate 15mg once weekly for rheumatoid arthritis (CYP2C9 *1/*1, CYP3A4 normal, eGFR 65) has started taking Neem (Azadirachta indica) 500mg leaf extract daily for skin conditions and blood purification. Please assess for interactions.

cases.title: Ciprofloxacin + Licorice
cases.mechanism: Glycyrrhetinic acid inhibits CYP1A2, a partial clearance pathway for ciprofloxacin, modestly increasing fluoroquinolone exposure. Licorice-induced hypokalemia further potentiates ciprofloxacin's QT-prolonging tendency. (Tier calc: delta_g=-6.8 CYP1A2 inhibition -> ccf=-0.20 -> AUC +25%; 2x moderate evidence -> YELLOW)
cases.sample_message: @Intake @PatientProfile New case: 48M on Ciprofloxacin 500mg twice daily for a urinary tract infection (CYP2C9 *1/*1, CYP3A4 normal, eGFR 80) has been taking Yashtimadhu (licorice root) 3g powder twice daily for chronic acidity. Please assess for interactions.

cases.title: Omeprazole + Black Pepper (Piperine)
cases.mechanism: Piperine is a potent CYP2C19 inhibitor; omeprazole is primarily metabolised by CYP2C19. Increased omeprazole exposure enhances acid suppression but raises risk of long-term PPI adverse effects (hypomagnesaemia, C. difficile, fracture risk). (Tier calc: delta_g=-6.9 CYP2C19 inhibition -> ccf=-0.225 -> AUC +29%; 2x moderate evidence -> YELLOW)
cases.sample_message: @Intake @PatientProfile New case: 52M on Omeprazole 20mg once daily for GERD (CYP2C9 *1/*1, CYP3A4 normal, eGFR 90) has been taking a daily supplement containing 10mg piperine (BioPerine, from Black Pepper) for enhanced nutrient absorption. Please assess for interactions.

cases.title: Insulin Glargine + Fenugreek

herbs.name: Fenugreek
herbs.dose: 10 g seed powder, with breakfast daily

cases.mechanism: 4-Hydroxyisoleucine from fenugreek directly stimulates insulin secretion and improves peripheral glucose uptake, additive with exogenous insulin. Galactomannan fibre blunts postprandial glucose excursions. Risk: combined hypoglycaemia, especially fasting. (Tier calc: structural 'none' basis -> ccf=0 -> AUC +0%; 2x moderate evidence from RCT and case data -> YELLOW)
cases.sample_message: @Intake @PatientProfile New case: 60M with type 2 diabetes on Insulin Glargine 10 IU once daily at bedtime (CYP2C9 *1/*1, CYP3A4 normal, eGFR 68) has started taking 10g fenugreek seed powder with breakfast on Ayurvedic advice for blood sugar control. Please assess for interactions.

cases.title: Phenytoin + Shankhpushpi
cases.mechanism: Shankhpushpi (Convolvulus pluricaulis) reduces phenytoin plasma levels by approximately 50%, attributed to CYP2C9 induction and possibly reduced GI absorption; breakthrough seizures documented in clinical study. (Tier calc: delta_g=-7.5 CYP2C9 induction -> ccf=+0.375 -> AUC -27%; 2x high evidence (seizure cases) -> RED by rule 1)
cases.sample_message: @Intake @PatientProfile New case: 35M with epilepsy on Phenytoin 200mg once daily (CYP2C9 *1/*1, CYP3A4 normal, eGFR 90) has started taking Shankhpushpi syrup 10mL twice daily prescribed by an Ayurvedic practitioner for memory enhancement. Please assess for interactions.

cases.title: Amoxicillin + Garlic
cases.mechanism: Allicin from garlic has weak P-gp effects at high supplemental doses; at typical culinary exposure, no clinically significant pharmacokinetic interaction with amoxicillin occurs. Garlic's antimicrobial activity is complementary rather than antagonistic. (Tier calc: delta_g=-5.8 P-gp -> magnitude=0 below threshold -> ccf=0; evidence all 'low' -> GREEN)
cases.sample_message: @Intake @PatientProfile New case: 32M on Amoxicillin 500mg three times daily for a community-acquired infection (CYP2C9 *1/*1, CYP3A4 normal, eGFR 100) regularly consumes one clove of raw garlic daily as part of his diet. Please assess for interactions.

cases.title: Levothyroxine + Shatavari
cases.mechanism: Shatavari's phytoestrogenic saponins theoretically could alter thyroid-binding globulin levels, but published evidence for this specific combination is absent; no pharmacokinetic interaction has been documented. Risk is theoretical only. (Tier calc: no structural target -> ccf=0; evidence all 'low' -> GREEN)
cases.sample_message: @Intake @PatientProfile New case: 42F with hypothyroidism on Levothyroxine 100mcg once daily fasting (CYP2C9 *1/*1, CYP3A4 normal, eGFR 92) has been prescribed Shatavari (Asparagus racemosus) 500mg twice daily by an Ayurvedic doctor for hormonal balance. Please assess for interactions.

cases.title: Lithium + Dandelion
cases.mechanism: Dandelion's natriuretic/diuretic effect can reduce serum sodium, promoting compensatory proximal tubular reabsorption of lithium and raising plasma lithium levels. Lithium has a narrow therapeutic index; even modest accumulation can cause toxicity. (Tier calc: structural 'none' basis -> ccf=0; 2x moderate evidence -> YELLOW)
cases.sample_message: @Intake @PatientProfile New case: 38M with bipolar disorder on Lithium Carbonate 450mg twice daily (CYP2C9 *1/*1, CYP3A4 normal, eGFR 88) has been taking Dandelion leaf extract 500mg twice daily as a 'liver detox' supplement. Please assess for interactions.

cases.title: Rifampicin + Turmeric (Curcumin)
cases.mechanism: Curcumin inhibits CYP3A4 and P-gp, potentially raising rifampicin exposure during the early induction phase. More critically, both are independently hepatotoxic; co-administration during TB treatment substantially elevates hepatotoxicity risk. (Tier calc: delta_g=-7.1 CYP3A4 inhibition -> ccf=-0.275 -> AUC +38%; 1x high evidence (hepatotoxicity) -> RED by rule 1)
cases.sample_message: @Intake @PatientProfile New case: 35M on Rifampicin 600mg once daily for pulmonary tuberculosis (CYP2C9 *1/*1, CYP3A4 normal, eGFR 72) has been self-administering Turmeric curcumin extract 1000mg daily on advice from family for immune support during TB treatment. Please assess for interactions.

cases.title: Clopidogrel + Ginger

herbs.name: Ginger
herbs.dose: 2 g dried ginger supplement, twice daily

cases.mechanism: 6-Gingerol inhibits platelet TXA2 synthesis, additive with clopidogrel's ADP-receptor blockade -> combined bleeding risk. Concurrent CYP2C9 inhibition by shogaol may also reduce clopidogrel bioactivation, creating an unpredictable net effect on platelet function. (Tier calc: delta_g=-6.9 CYP2C9 inhibition -> ccf=-0.225 -> AUC +29%; 2x moderate evidence -> YELLOW)
cases.sample_message: @Intake @PatientProfile New case: 63M post-MI on Clopidogrel 75mg once daily (CYP2C9 *1/*2, CYP3A4 normal, eGFR 65) has been taking 2g dried ginger supplement twice daily for knee joint pain. Please assess for interactions.

cases.title: Sildenafil + Ginkgo biloba

herbs.name: Ginkgo biloba
herbs.dose: 120 mg standardized extract (24% ginkgoflavone glycosides), once daily

cases.mechanism: Ginkgo biloba enhances endothelial nitric oxide production and exerts PAF-antagonist antiplatelet effects; combined with sildenafil's PDE5-mediated vasodilation -> additive hypotension and bleeding risk, particularly in elderly or cardiovascular-compromised patients. (Tier calc: delta_g=-6.9 CYP3A4 inhibition -> ccf=-0.225 -> AUC +29%; 2x moderate evidence -> YELLOW)
cases.sample_message: @Intake @PatientProfile New case: 55M using Sildenafil 50mg as needed for erectile dysfunction (CYP2C9 *1/*1, CYP3A4 normal, eGFR 85) has been taking Ginkgo biloba 120mg standardized extract daily for memory and circulation. Please assess for interactions.

cases.title: Clonazepam + Valerian
cases.mechanism: Valerenic acid is a positive allosteric modulator of GABA-A receptors — the same target as benzodiazepines. Pharmacodynamic additivity with clonazepam -> enhanced sedation, psychomotor impairment, and respiratory depression risk at higher combined doses. (Tier calc: delta_g=-6.8 CYP3A4 inhibition -> ccf=-0.20 -> AUC +25%; 2x moderate evidence -> YELLOW)
cases.sample_message: @Intake @PatientProfile New case: 45F with anxiety disorder on Clonazepam 1mg once daily at bedtime (CYP2C9 *1/*1, CYP3A4 normal, eGFR 95) has started self-prescribing Valerian root extract 450mg at bedtime for sleep. Please assess for interactions.

cases.title: Prednisolone + Yashtimadhu (Licorice)
cases.mechanism: Glycyrrhetinic acid inhibits 11beta-HSD2, potentiating glucocorticoid effects, and inhibits CYP3A4, reducing prednisolone clearance. Combined effect: Cushingoid features, fluid retention, hypokalemia, and hypertension at normally tolerated prednisolone doses. (Tier calc: delta_g=-7.7 CYP3A4 inhibition -> ccf=-0.425 -> |ccf|=0.425>=0.4 + high confidence -> RED; 2x high evidence confirms)
cases.sample_message: @Intake @PatientProfile New case: 50F with rheumatoid arthritis on Prednisolone 10mg once daily (CYP2C9 *1/*1, CYP3A4 normal, eGFR 72) has been taking Yashtimadhu (licorice) 3g root powder twice daily for GERD symptoms. Please assess for interactions.

cases.title: Cyclosporine + St. John's Wort
cases.mechanism: Hyperforin (PXR agonist) induces CYP3A4 and P-gp, reducing cyclosporine bioavailability and blood levels by 40-60%; FDA/EMA contraindicated — confirmed acute organ rejection cases. (Tier calc: delta_g=-9.1 CYP3A4 induction -> ccf=+0.70 (clamped) -> AUC -41%; 3x high evidence -> RED by rule 1)
cases.sample_message: @Intake @PatientProfile New case: 40M post-renal-transplant on Cyclosporine 150mg twice daily (CYP2C9 *1/*1, CYP3A4 normal, eGFR 60) has started taking St. John's Wort 300mg twice daily for depression after transplant. Please assess for interactions.

cases.title: Furosemide + Dandelion
cases.mechanism: Dandelion has mild diuretic properties but its potency is negligible compared to furosemide (a high-ceiling loop diuretic); at typical supplemental doses the additive diuretic effect is clinically insignificant. No pharmacokinetic interaction. (Tier calc: delta_g below threshold -> ccf=0; evidence all 'low' -> GREEN)
cases.sample_message: @Intake @PatientProfile New case: 65F with mild heart failure on Furosemide 40mg once daily (CYP2C9 *1/*1, CYP3A4 normal, eGFR 58) has been drinking dandelion leaf tea (250mg extract equivalent) daily as a traditional kidney tonic. Please assess for interactions.

cases.title: Amiodarone + Fenugreek
cases.mechanism: Fenugreek-induced electrolyte imbalance (natriuresis, potential hyponatraemia) can further prolong QT interval, synergistic with amiodarone's intrinsic QT-prolonging activity -> risk of torsades de pointes. Trigonelline also inhibits CYP3A4, potentially increasing amiodarone accumulation. (Tier calc: delta_g=-7.0 CYP3A4 inhibition -> ccf=-0.25; 1x high evidence (QT/torsades risk) -> RED by rule 1)
cases.sample_message: @Intake @PatientProfile New case: 70M with persistent atrial fibrillation on Amiodarone 200mg once daily (CYP2C9 *1/*3, CYP3A4 normal, eGFR 52) has been taking 15g fenugreek seed powder daily for blood sugar and cholesterol management. Please assess for interactions.

cases.title: Cetirizine + Ashwagandha
cases.mechanism: Cetirizine is primarily renally excreted with minimal CYP metabolism; Withaferin A from Ashwagandha shows negligible activity at cetirizine's clearance pathways. No published pharmacokinetic or pharmacodynamic interaction has been identified for this combination. (Tier calc: delta_g below threshold -> ccf=0; evidence all 'low' -> GREEN)
cases.sample_message: @Intake @PatientProfile New case: 28F with allergic rhinitis on Cetirizine 10mg once daily (CYP2C9 *1/*1, CYP3A4 normal, eGFR 100) has started taking Ashwagandha root extract 300mg daily for stress management. Please assess for interactions.
